resources.string: Tick feedback on taps and navigation
This will reset all tutorials popups. Continue?

By using VortexApp you agree to these terms.

This application is provided "as-is", without warranty of any kind, express or implied. The developer makes no guarantees regarding fitness for a particular purpose or uninterrupted operation.

You are solely responsible for any use of this software and for any interactions with Bluetooth devices it controls. The developer is not liable for any damages arising from the use or inability to use this application.

VortexApp is open-source software. You may use, modify, and distribute it in accordance with its license. You can find the license here: https://github.com/Project-Void-Studio/VortexApp

VortexApp connects to Bluetooth devices on your behalf. We do not collect, store, or share personal data with third parties.\n\nBluetooth and location permissions are required solely to scan for and connect to BLE devices.
